note: Mathlib/Topology/MetricSpace/Congruence.lean:44 — def Congruent (v1 v2 : ι → P) := ∀ i j, edist (v1 i) (v1 j) = edist (v2 i) (v2 j); docstring cites https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Congruence_(geometry); Q154210's enwiki sitelink is exactly Congruence_(geometry) (confirmed via Wikidata entity fetch, description 'when two figures or objects in geometry have the same shape and size'). Geometric SSS/SAS/ASA/AAS triangle-congruence criteria are proved from this def in Mathlib/Geometry/Euclidean/Congruence.lean.
